module.name: no-barrel-parent-imports
module.description: Disallow parent-directory imports ('..' and '../*') inside single-extension barrel files such as index.ts and index.js across import declarations, import expressions, require calls, and import-equals declarations.

scenarios.name: should allow a parent import declaration in a non-barrel file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration

scenarios.name: should allow a require call with a parent path in a non-barrel file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the require call

scenarios.name: should allow a dynamic import with a parent path in a non-barrel file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import expression

scenarios.name: should allow a parent import in a double-extension index-like file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration
scenarios.then: no violation is reported because only single-extension index files are treated as barrels

scenarios.name: should report an import using '../' prefix in a barrel file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration

scenarios.name: should report the bare '..' parent path in a barrel file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration

scenarios.name: should report a dynamic import() with a parent path in a barrel file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import expression

scenarios.name: should report a require() call with a parent path in a barrel file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the require call

scenarios.name: should report an import-equals declaration with a parent path in a barrel file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import-equals declaration
